notification: A coordinated landlord lobby campaign is pressuring council to weaken tenant protections.

choices.label: Stand Firm on Tenant Protections
choices.description: Maintain current protections at the cost of short-term business confidence.

choices.label: Negotiate a Compromise
choices.description: Trade partial concessions for calmer market conditions.

choices.label: Fully Concede
choices.description: Prioritize market sentiment over tenant protections.
